title: AI features
subtitle: Profile-based recommendations, eligibility checks, and a help chatbot. All AI output is advisory — verify with the official listing.
disclaimer: AI-generated guidance. Verify with official sources before acting.

recommendations.heading: Recommended for you
recommendations.intro: Scholarships matched to your profile, each with a match score and a short explanation.
recommendations.empty: We couldn't match any open scholarships to your profile yet. Update your preferred fields and countries to improve results.
recommendations.noCacheBody: Generate a personalized set of scholarship recommendations based on your profile.
recommendations.error: We couldn't load your recommendations. Please try again.

eligibility.heading: Eligibility check
eligibility.intro: Pick a scholarship to see whether you meet its criteria and what to improve.
eligibility.searchHint: Start typing to search for a scholarship to check.
eligibility.searchError: Scholarship search failed. Please try again.
eligibility.completeProfile: Complete your profile for an accurate eligibility result.

improve.heading: What to improve
improve.intro: Strengthen these areas to improve your eligibility.
improve.none: You meet every criterion — nothing to improve here.

eligibility.error: The eligibility check failed. Please try again.

chat.heading: Ask ScholarPath
chat.intro: Ask about scholarships, deadlines, eligibility, and studying abroad.
chat.emptyHint: I can point you to scholarships, deadlines, and applications. What are you looking for?
chat.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?

suggestions.scholarships: Show me scholarships in computer science
suggestions.eligibility: Am I eligible for the Chevening scholarship?
suggestions.essay: How do I write a strong personal statement?

chat.quickActionsHint: Pick one to prefill the chat — edit the details before sending.

recommendationLetter.label: Write a Recommendation Letter
recommendationLetter.prompt: Help me write a strong recommendation letter for a graduate scholarship application. The candidate is [name], who I taught/supervised in [course/role] for [duration]. Their key strengths are [strengths]. Please draft the letter with a clear opening, two paragraphs of concrete evidence, and a confident closing.

statementOfPurpose.label: Structure my Statement of Purpose
statementOfPurpose.prompt: Help me structure a Statement of Purpose for a [Master's / PhD] application in [field] at [target university]. My background is [background], my motivation is [motivation], and my research interests are [interests]. Give me an outline with section-by-section guidance and word counts.

interviewPrep.label: Prepare for Interview
interviewPrep.prompt: Help me prepare for a scholarship interview for [scholarship name]. My field is [field] and my background is [background]. List the most likely questions, suggest a STAR-format answer template, and give me 3 thoughtful questions to ask the panel at the end.

improveEssay.label: Improve my Essay
improveEssay.prompt:
Please review and improve the following essay for a scholarship application. Focus on clarity, flow, stronger verbs, and removing filler. Keep my voice. Here is the draft:

[paste your essay here]

sidebar.title: Your chats
sidebar.empty: Your past chats will appear here.
sidebar.loadError: We couldn't load your past chats.

errors.budgetExceeded: You've hit today's AI budget. Try again after midnight UTC.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
